name: Spotify
description: Full access to your Spotify music library. Search tracks, manage playlists, save songs, view play history, and more.

tools.name: skeleton_refresh_spotify_stats
tools.description: Spotify library stats: liked track count and playlist count for classifier

tools.name: skeleton_refresh_spotify_now_playing
tools.description: Spotify current track being played by user

tools.name: connect_spotify
tools.description: Connect your Spotify account via OAuth 2.0. Returns an authorisation URL to visit.

tools.name: disconnect_spotify
tools.description: Disconnect your Spotify account and remove all stored credentials.

tools.name: check_spotify_connection
tools.description: Check if you are connected to Spotify and get your profile info.

tools.name: search_tracks
tools.description: Search Spotify catalogue for tracks. Use track_name/artist_name/album_name for precise lookups (e.g. track_name='Rasputin' artist_name='Boney M'). Fall back to query for vague or partial searches. Returns a list of matching tracks with id, title, artist, duration, album_art. Use the track id from results to play or add to playlist.

query.description: Free-text search query — use when you only have a partial name or are unsure of the exact title/artist
query.title: Query

track_name.description: Exact track title — use instead of query when you know the precise song name
track_name.title: Track Name

artist_name.description: Exact artist name — combine with track_name or album_name for precise results
artist_name.title: Artist Name

album_name.description: Exact album name — combine with artist_name to narrow results
album_name.title: Album Name

tools.name: get_playlists
tools.description: List all playlists owned or followed by the user. Use this to browse or find a playlist before playing or editing it. Returns id, title, track_count, image_url.

tools.name: get_playlist_tracks
tools.description: List tracks in a playlist WITHOUT playing it. Use this to browse contents. To actually play the playlist, use play_playlist instead. Accepts playlist_id or playlist name.

tools.name: create_playlist
tools.description: Create a NEW empty playlist. Call this ONLY when the user explicitly asks to create a playlist — NOT for viewing existing ones (use get_playlists) or playing one (use play_playlist).

tracks.description: Optional list of track IDs to add on creation
tracks.title: Tracks

is_public.description: Set to true to make the playlist public
is_public.title: Is Public

tools.name: add_track_to_playlist
tools.description: Add a track to an existing playlist. Accepts track name/artist or track_id. In chains after search_tracks, pass the track_id from results. Accepts playlist name or playlist_id.

tools.name: remove_track_from_playlist
tools.description: Remove a track from a playlist. Accepts track name/artist or track_id, and playlist name or playlist_id.

tools.name: delete_playlist
tools.description: Delete (unfollow) a playlist from the user's library by playlist_id. Use get_playlists first to find the playlist_id if you only have the name.

tools.name: add_tracks_to_playlist
tools.description: Add multiple tracks to a playlist in one operation. Pass a list of track_ids. Use this after get_artist_top_tracks, get_album_tracks, or search_tracks to bulk-add results to a playlist.

track_ids.description: List of Spotify track IDs to add
track_ids.title: Track Ids

tools.name: get_recent_tracks
tools.description: Get the user's recently played tracks (requires Spotify Premium). Returns list of tracks with full details.

limit.description: Number of recently played tracks to return (requires Spotify Premium)
limit.title: Limit

tools.name: get_liked_tracks
tools.description: Get all tracks saved/liked in the user's Spotify library. Returns list of liked tracks with full details.

limit.description: Number of saved/liked tracks to return
limit.title: Limit

tools.name: like_track
tools.description: Like a specific track by track_id. Use in chains after search_tracks. To like the currently playing track without knowing its ID, use sp_like instead.

tools.name: unlike_track
tools.description: Unlike a specific track by track_id. Use in chains after search_tracks. To unlike the currently playing track, use sp_like instead.

tools.name: get_user_profile
tools.description: Get the authenticated user's Spotify profile information including username, followers, and subscription type.

tools.name: play_track
tools.description: Play a specific track. Accepts a track_id from search_tracks results, or a track name/artist (will search and play the best match). If the request is ambiguous or you are not certain which track the user means, call search_tracks first and show the results so the user can confirm. If the request is unambiguous (e.g. 'Rasputin by Boney M'), play immediately without asking.

track_id.description: Spotify track ID or track name/artist to search for and play
track_id.title: Track Id

playlist_id.description: Optional playlist ID — if provided, plays track within playlist context so next/prev work through the playlist
playlist_id.title: Playlist Id

track_ids_queue.description: Optional list of track IDs to play as a queue starting from track_id. Used when playing from liked/recent tracks so next/prev work.
track_ids_queue.title: Track Ids Queue

tools.name: play_playlist
tools.description: Start playing a playlist on the active Spotify device. Use this to PLAY a playlist. To only browse tracks without playing, use get_playlist_tracks instead. Accepts playlist_id or playlist name.

tools.name: play_album
tools.description: Search for an album by name and play it on the active Spotify device. Use this when the user wants to play a specific album.

album_name.description: Album name to search for and play
album_name.title: Album Name

tools.name: open_demo_playlist
tools.description: Open demo playlist (no Spotify login required). Returns demo tracks for testing.

tools.name: demo_play_track
tools.description: Play a specific track from demo playlist.

track_id.description: Demo track ID or track name/artist to search for and play
track_id.title: Track Id

tools.name: demo_next_track
tools.description: Skip to next track in demo playlist.

tools.name: demo_prev_track
tools.description: Go to previous track in demo playlist.

tools.name: demo_pause
tools.description: Toggle playback pause/resume in demo mode.

tools.name: demo_shuffle
tools.description: Toggle shuffle mode in demo playlist.

tools.name: get_lyrics
tools.description: Fetch full song lyrics text. Returns the complete lyrics as text if found on lrclib.net, otherwise returns a Genius URL. Only track_name is required; providing artist_name improves accuracy.

tools.name: sp_prev
tools.description: Skip to the previous track in the Spotify playback queue.

tools.name: sp_next
tools.description: Skip to the next track in the Spotify playback queue.

tools.name: sp_play_pause
tools.description: Toggle Spotify playback between playing and paused states.

tools.name: sp_shuffle
tools.description: Toggle Spotify shuffle mode on or off for the current playback session.

tools.name: sp_like
tools.description: Toggle like/unlike on the currently playing track — no track_id needed. Use this when the user wants to like or save what's playing right now. To like a specific track by ID, use like_track instead.

tools.name: get_artist_top_tracks
tools.description: Get top tracks for an artist by name. Returns up to 10 most popular tracks with id, title, album, duration. Use track ids from results to play or add to playlist.

tools.name: get_artist_albums
tools.description: Get albums and singles released by an artist. Returns list of albums with id, name, release_date, tracks_count. Use album id with get_album_tracks to browse an album's tracks.

tools.name: get_album_tracks
tools.description: Get all tracks from an album by album name (and optionally artist name). Returns track list with ids, titles, durations. Use track ids to play individual tracks or add them to a playlist.

artist_name.description: Artist name to narrow the search (optional but recommended)
artist_name.title: Artist Name

tools.name: remove_tracks_from_playlist_by_name
tools.description: Remove one or more tracks from a playlist by name in a single step. Use this when the user says 'remove [track] from [playlist]' — no need to search for track IDs first. Accepts playlist_id (use get_playlists to find it) and a list of track names.

track_names.description: One or more track names to remove from the playlist
track_names.title: Track Names

playlist_id.description: Spotify playlist ID. Use get_playlists first if you only have the playlist name.
playlist_id.title: Playlist Id

artist_name.description: Optional artist name to narrow the match when multiple tracks share the same title
artist_name.title: Artist Name

tools.name: add_artist_top_tracks_to_playlist
tools.description: Find an artist by name and add their top tracks to a playlist in one step. Use when the user says 'add top tracks from [artist] to [playlist]' or 'add N tracks by [artist] to [playlist]'.

playlist_id.description: Spotify playlist ID to add tracks to
playlist_id.title: Playlist Id

limit.description: Number of top tracks to add (max 10)
limit.title: Limit

tools.name: add_album_tracks_to_playlist
tools.description: Find an album by name and add its tracks to a playlist in one step. Use when the user says 'add tracks from [album] to [playlist]' or 'add first N tracks from [album] to [playlist]'.

artist_name.description: Artist name to narrow the album search (optional)
artist_name.title: Artist Name

playlist_id.description: Spotify playlist ID to add tracks to
playlist_id.title: Playlist Id

limit.description: Maximum number of tracks to add from the album
limit.title: Limit

secrets.name: spotify_client_id
secrets.description: Spotify OAuth Client ID from developer.spotify.com

secrets.name: spotify_client_secret
secrets.description: Spotify OAuth Client Secret from developer.spotify.com

secrets.name: genius_access_token
secrets.description: Genius API access token for lyrics lookup (optional)
